text: I am intrigued by the juxtaposition of sterile, structured architecture and the vibrant pulse of innovation inside the glass. From the outside, there's a sense of anticipation—a threshold before insight. Crossing into the R+D space, I feel energized, my mind animated by the bold colors and ideas on display. The text on the wall speaks to the flux of research and human connection with technology, which resonates with my own philosophical musings on progress and meaning. I am mindful, aware of the present moment, and curious about how these thoughts will evolve as I stand here, both an observer and a participant in this evolving narrative of discovery.
